mapper.select: select * from ads_taobao_category_goods_price order by avg_price desc
select * from ads_taobao_category_goods_sales order by total_sales
select * from ads_taobao_city_goods_price order by avg_price desc
select * from ads_taobao_city_goods_sales order by total_sales desc
select * from ads_taobao_province_goods_sales order by total_sales desc
select * from ads_taobao_province_postfree_rate order by postfree_rate desc
select * from ads_taobao_shop_goods_sales order by total_sales desc
SELECT `NAME` as shop_name, SUM( deal * price ) as gmv FROM t_taobao_goods_sales where `NAME` != 'INTO YOU旗舰店' GROUP BY shop_name ORDER BY gmv DESC limit 30
SELECT city, SUM( deal * price ) as gmv FROM t_taobao_goods_sales GROUP BY city ORDER BY gmv DESC limit 30
